r.holeSize=="number"?r.holeSize:"50"}"/>`),s+="</c:"+e+"Chart>";break;default:s+="";break}return s}function Oc(e,t,r){let n="";return e._type===Ae.SCATTER||e._type===Ae.BUBBLE||e._type===Ae.BUBBLE3D?n+="<c:valAx>":n+="<c:"+(e.catLabelFormatCode?"dateAx":"catAx")+">",n+='  <c:axId val="'+t+'"/>',n+="  <c:scaling>",n+='<c:orientation val="'+(e.catAxisOrientation||(e.barDir==="col","minMax"))+'"/>',(e.catAxisMaxVal||e.catAxisMaxVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:max val="${e.catAxisMaxVal}"/>`),(e.catAxisMinVal||e.catAxisMinVal===0)&&(n+=`<c:min val="${e.catAxisMinVal}"/>`),n+="</c:scaling>",n+='  <c:delete val="'+(e.catAxisHidden?"1":"0")+'"/>',n+='  <c:axPos val="'+(e.barDir==="col"?"b":"l")+'"/>',n+=e.catGridLine.style!=="none"?zc(e.catGridLine):"",e.showCatAxisTitle&&(n+=Cs({color:e.catAxisTitleColor,fontFace:e.catAxisTitleFontFace,fontSize:e.catAxisTitleFontSize,titleRotate:e.catAxisTitleRotate,title:e.catAxisTitle||"Axis Title"})),e._type===Ae.SCATTER||e._type===Ae.BUBBLE||e._type===Ae.BUBBLE3D?n+='  <c:numFmt formatCode="'+(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode?Ne(e.valAxisLabelFormatCode):"General")+'" sourceLinked="1"/>':n+=' val="nextTo"/>'):(n+='  <c:majorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMajorTickMark||"out")+'"/>',n+='  <c:minorTickMark val="'+(e.catAxisMinorTickMark||"none")+'"/>',n+='  <c:tickLblPos val="'+(e.catAxisLabelPos||(e.barDir==="col"?"low":"nextTo"))+'"/>'),n+="  <c:spPr>",n+=`    <a:ln w="${e.catAxisLineSize?Te(e.catAxisLineSize):Yo}" Wk(e){const t=Ss({nonce:se()});return ie(()=>e?.value||t.nonce?.value)}function bu(e,t="hex"){switch(t){case"hex":return Vk(e);case"rgb":return $k(e);case"hsl":return qk(e);case"hsb":return Gk(e);default:throw new Error(`Unknown format: ${t}`)}}function Vk(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:xn(e),r=n=>Math.round(n).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");if(t.alpha<1){const n=Math.round(t.alpha*255).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}${n}`}return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}`}function $k(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:xn(e),{r,g:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`rgba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)}, ${o})`:`rgb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)})`}function qk(e){const t=e.space==="hsl"?e:Ao(e),{h:r,s:n,l:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsla(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsl(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function Gk(e){const t=e.space==="hsb"?e:Ws(e),{h:r,s:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function xn(e){if(e.space==="rgb")return e;if(e.space==="hsl")return Hk(e);if(e.space==="hsb")return Qk(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${e.space}`)}function Ao(e){return e.space==="hsl"?e:Xk(xn(e))}function Ws(e){return e.space==="hsb"?e:jk(xn(e))}function Xk(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,u=0;const c=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(u=c>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:u*100,l:c*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Hk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const u=(l,d,p)=>(p<0&&(p+=1),p>1&&(p-=1),p<.16666666666666666?l+(d-l)*6*p:p<.5?d:p<.6666666666666666?l+(d-l)*(.6666666666666666-p)*6:l),c=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-c;a=u(s,c,t+1/3),o=u(s,c,t),i=u(s,c,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function jk(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let u=0;const c=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:u=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:u=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:u=(t-r)/i+4;break}u/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:u*360,s:c*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Qk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const u=Math.floor(t*6),c=t*6-u,s=n*(1-r),l=n*(1-c*r),d=n*(1-(1-c)*r);switch(u%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=l,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=l,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=l;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function ui(e){switch(e){case"hue":return{min:0,max:360,step:1};case"saturation":case"lightness":case"brightness":case"alpha":return{min:0,max:100,step:1};case"red":case"green":case"blue":return{min:0,max:255,step:1};default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${e}`)}}function di(e,t){switch(t){case"red":return e.space==="rgb"?e.r:xn(e).r;case"green":return e.space==="rgb"?e.g:xn(e).g;case"blue":return e.space==="rgb"?e.b:xn(e).b;case"hue":return e.space==="hsl"?e.h:Ao(e).h;case"saturation":return e.space==="hsl"||e.space==="hsb"?e.s:Ao(e).s;case"lightness":return e.space==="hsl"?e.l:Ao(e).l;case"brightness":return e.space==="hsb"?e.b:Ws(e).b;case"alpha":return e.alpha*100;default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}}function La(e,t,r){const n=ui(t),a=Math.max(n.min,Math.min(n.max,r));if(t==="alpha")return{...e,alpha:a/100};if(t==="red"||t==="green"||t==="blue"){const i={...xn(e),[t==="red"?"r":t==="green"?"g":"b"]:a};return Yk(i,e.space)}if(t==="hue"||t==="lightness"){const i={...Ao(e),[t==="hue"?"h":"l"]:a};return ng(i,e.space)}if(t==="saturation"){if(e.space==="hsb"){const c={...Ws(e),s:a};return ag(c,e.space)}const i={...Ao(e),s:a};return ng(i,e.space)}if(t==="brightness"){const i={...Ws(e),b:a};return ag(i,e.space)}throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}function Yk(e,t){if(t==="rgb")return e;if(t==="hsl")return og(e);if(t==="hsb")return ig(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function ng(e,t){if(t==="hsl")return e;const r=Kk(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsb")return ig(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function ag(e,t){if(t==="hsb")return e;const r=Jk(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsl")return og(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function og(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,u=0;const c=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(u=c>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:u*100,l:c*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Kk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const u=(l,d,p)=>(p<0&&(p+=1),p>1&&(p-=1),p<.16666666666666666?l+(d-l)*6*p:p<.5?d:p<.6666666666666666?l+(d-l)*(.6666666666666666-p)*6:l),c=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-c;a=u(s,c,t+1/3),o=u(s,c,t),i=u(s,c,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function ig(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let u=0;const c=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:u=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:u=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:u=(t-r)/i+4;break}u/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:u*360,s:c*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function Jk(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const u=Math.floor(t*6),c=t*6-u,s=n*(1-r),l=n*(1-c*r),d=n*(1-(1-c)*r);switch(u%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=l,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=l,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=l;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function Vs(e){const t=e.trim().toLowerCase();if(t.startsWith("#"))return Zk(t);if(t.startsWith("rgb"))return e2(t);if(t.startsWith("hsl"))return t2(t);if(t.startsWith("hsb")||t.startsWith("hsv"))return r2(t);throw new Error(`Unable to parse color: ${e}`)}function Zk(e){let t=e.slice(1);if(!/^[0-9A-F]{3}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{8}$/i.test(t))throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}. Expected format: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA`);if(t.length===3&&(t=t.split("").map(r=>r+r).join("")),t.length===6){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>16&255,g:r>>8&255,b:r&255,alpha:1}}if(t.length===8){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>24&255,g:r>>16&255,b:r>>8&255,alpha:(r&255)/255}}throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}`)}function e2(e){const t=e.match(/rgba?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid RGB color: ${e}`);return{space:"rgb",r:parseFloat(t[1]),g:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function t2(e){const t=e.match(/hsla?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSL color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsl",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),l:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function r2(e){const t=e.match(/hsb[av]?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSB color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsb",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function n2(e){return typeof e=="string"?Vs(e):e}function a2(e){try{return Vs(e),!0}catch{return!1}}const[o2,i2]=fr("ColorFieldRoot");var s2=de({inheritAttrs:!1,__name:"ColorFieldRoot",props:{modelValue:{type:[String,Object],required:!1},defaultValue:{type:[String,Object],required:!1,default:"#000000"},colorSpace:{type:String,required:!1,default:"hsl"},channel:{type:String,required:!1},placeholder:{type:String,required:!1},disabled:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},readonly:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},disableWheelChange:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},locale:{type:String,required:!1},step:{type:Number,required:!1},asChild:{type:Boolean,required:!1},as:{type:null,required:!1,default:"div"},name:{type:String,required:!1},required:{type:Boolean,required:!1}},emits:["update:modelValue","update:color"],setup(e,{emit:t}){const D(){if(w.value=!1,o.value){const H=parseFloat(v.value);if(!isNaN(H)){const q=ui(o.value),j=Math.max(q.min,Math.min(q.max,H));m.value=La(m.value,o.value,j)}v.value=y(m.value)}else{const V(){if(i.value||u.value)return;const H=N();if(o.value){const q=di(m.value,o.value);m.value=La(m.value,o.value,q+H),v.value=y(m.value)}else L(H)}function C(){if(i.value||u.value)return;const u(){r.value=!0}function c(d){r.value&&t.handleWheel(d)}function t.isThemeGetter=!0,t},Dg=/^\[(?:(\w[\w-]*):)?(.+)\]$/i,Pg=/^\((?:(\w[\w-]*):)?(.+)\)$/i,NE=/^\d+(?:\.\d+)?\/\d+(?:\.\d+)?$/,IE=/^(\d+(\.\d+)?)?(xs|sm|md|lg|xl)$/,RE=/\d+(%|px|r?em|[sdl]?v([hwib]|min|max)|pt|pc|in|cm|mm|cap|ch|ex|r?lh|cq(w|h|i|b|min|max))|\b(calc|min|max|clamp)\(.+\)|^0$/,FE=/^(rgba?|hsla?|hwb|(ok)?(lab|lch)|color-mix)\(.+\)$/,OE=/^(inset_)?-?((\d+)?\.?(\d+)[a-z]+|0)_-?((\d+)?\.?(\d+)[a-z]+|0)/,ME=/^(url|image|image-set|cross-fade|element|(repeating-)?(linear|radial|conic)-gradient)\(.+\)$/,jn=e=>NE.test(e),$e=e=>!!e&&!Number.isNaN(Number(e)),Qn=e=>!!e&&Number.isInteger(Number(e)),_u=e=>e.endsWith("%")&&$e(e.slice(0,-1)),_n=e=>IE.test(e),Bg=()=>!0,zE=e=>RE.test(e)&&!FE.test(e),Cu=()=>!1,UE=e=>OE.test(e),WE=e=>ME.test(e),VE=e=>!Ce(e)&&!ke(e),$E=e=>Yn(e,Mg,Cu),Ce=e=>Dg.test(e),Ta=e=>Yn(e,zg,zE),Ng=e=>Yn(e,KE,$e),qE=e=>Yn(e,Wg,Bg),GE=e=>Yn(e,Ug,Cu),Ig=e=>Yn(e,Fg,Cu),XE=e=>Yn(e,Og,WE),Hs=e=>Yn(e,Vg,UE),ke=e=>Pg.test(e),pi=e=>Da(e,zg),HE=e=>Da(e,Ug),Rg=e=>Da(e,Fg),jE=e=>Da(e,Mg),QE=e=>Da(e,Og),js=e=>Da(e,Vg,!0),YE=e=>Da(e,Wg,!0),Yn=(e,t,r)=>{const `+'html[dir=ltr],[data-sonner-toaster][dir=ltr]{--toast-icon-margin-start: -3px;--toast-icon-margin-end: 4px;--toast-svg-margin-start: -1px;--toast-svg-margin-end: 0px;--toast-button-margin-start:
